newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. The most recent disclosures (Q1 order intake -8.6% YoY to CHF 853M, 2026 guidance confirmed at 1-5% organic order growth and ~16.5% EBITDA margin, with a stronger H2 expected) date to April and predate the window. Nothing touches the latent AI-transfer pathway (coolant quality, water reuse, process control).

sources.label: Sulzer confirms moderate Q1 order intake

verdicts.rankRationale: Strict latent lens needs concrete evidence the fluid-engineering franchise actually plumbs into AI coolant/water-reuse/process-control. None has emerged since June 9; -5.6% drift on no news. Un-rerated speculative setup intact, hold.
verdicts.bull: Pumping/separation/purification IP is a plausible adjacency for data-center liquid-cooling loops and water reuse if demand crosses over.
verdicts.neutral: Industrial fluids name with confirmed but unexciting 2026 guidance; AI link remains a hypothesis, not a booked revenue stream.
verdicts.bear: Weak Q1 large-project orders, no AI-coolant evidence; the latent thesis may never convert and the name sits on generic industrial cyclicality.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: A named data-center coolant/water-reuse or process-control design win or partnership.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Latent AI pathway never materializes; remains a plain industrial cyclical.
